name: Grounded all natural Pet Shampoo -  Unscented - 300ml
shortDescription: Grounded Pet Shampoo is an all-natural, non-toxic shampoo for Dogs and Cats Gentle and effective for all breeds.
description: Grounded Pet Shampoo is an all-natural, non-toxic shampoo for Dogs and Cats It is made from a vegan, castille soap base and has a rich lather that will naturally soothe and moisturise your pets fur and skin. This unscented formulation is gentle and effective for all breeds. Ingredients : Concentrated Liquid Soap (Saponified Coconut, Sunflower, Canola Oils, Citric Acid), Water, Glycerin, Lemongrass Essential Oil. Instructions : Wet pet. Dilute into a pitcher with water, pour on pet & lather. Or squeeze sparingly onto coat and lather. Rinse well. Proudly MADE IN KENYA by Grounded
